---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- What do you want to add or change? -->

## Use Case
<!-- Why is this needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How do you think this should work? -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered other approaches? -->

## Affected Modules
<!-- Which parts of the codebase would this touch? -->
- [ ] gameplay.lua - main game loop
- [ ] unit.lua - unit behavior, combat
- [ ] peon.lua - worker AI
- [ ] pathfinding.lua - navigation
- [ ] map.lua - terrain, fog of war
- [ ] building.lua - structures
- [ ] ui/ - interface
- [ ] New module needed

## Complexity Estimate
<!-- Your gut feeling on how big this is -->
- [ ] Small - single file, few hours
- [ ] Medium - multiple files, day or two
- [ ] Large - architectural changes, week+
- [ ] Unknown

## Additional Context
<!-- Mockups, examples from other games, etc. -->
